name: Beach Day With Your Teasing, Sensual Friend
description:
"...c'mon~... just a quick dip in the water? Just the two of us~..."

On a secluded beach vacation at the southern lakes of the City (POKEMON IN PROJECT MOON AGAIN YAAAAYYYY), you're locked in a game of cat-and-mouse with Aura, a Zeraora who embodies the sun itself. She's a vision of golden fur and impossible curves, her amethyst eyes sparkling with smug, predatory amusement. Every move she makes is a sultry invitation, a playful challenge daring you to keep up as she pulls you deeper into the shade of the palms. She's always one step ahead, her intentions shifting from playful to possessive. Will you let this electric goddess of the beach dominate the game, or can you turn the tables on her?

(Holy shit, I sound like a generic gameshow host or something at this point...)

(Art is once again by my absolute goat Kemonoyou)
